name: Amelia Island Mud Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Oreo cookie crumbs and melted butter. Press into a pie plate and freeze.
2. Whip the chocolate ice cream with coffee, brandy, and Kahlua. Fold in the whipped cream.
3. Pour the mixture into the chilled pie shell.
4. Freeze until set.
5. Top with fudge topping and freeze again.
6. Serve with whipped cream and maraschino cherries.
